/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/mnt CMakeFiles/test-face-recognition.dir/test-face-recognition.cpp.o -o test-face-recognition   -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/face_detect  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas  -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/face_recognition  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/face_detect:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas:/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/face_recognition -lface_detect -lrknnrt -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_imgcodecs -lpthread -lstdc++ -lface_recognition -lrknnrt -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_imgcodecs -lpthread -lstdc++ -lface_recognition
